title: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures
description: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures is a built environment installation that takes on the familiar shape of a living room. title: Julie Buffalohead: Stories of Becoming
description: The stories adapted from European folktales often feature a desire for riches, status, and romance. In comparison, Indigenous stories highlight relations to other beings. In accordance with the Indigenous imperative to see the land, animals, and other living beings represented, Julie Buffalohead’s…

title: Everyday Democracy: Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness in Johnson County
